mapper.select: SELECT board_id, title, created_at FROM board WHERE category = 'LESSON' AND member_id = #{memberId} AND is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM board WHERE category = 'LESSON' AND member_id = #{memberId} AND is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board (image_id, author_id, member_id, category, title, content) VALUES (#{imageId}, #{authorId}, #{memberId}, #{category}, #{title}, #{content})
mapper.update:
UPDATE board
title = #{request.title}, content = #{request.content}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE board_id = #{boardId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE board SET is_deleted = TRUE, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE board_id = #{boardId}
